name: Structural Monitoring Systems Plc
summary: Structural Monitoring Systems Plc, through its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and markets structural health monitoring systems in Australia, the United States, Europe, and Canada. The company offers CVM switch for fatigue testing; CVM NDI structural monitoring systems; and laboratory kits for use in real-time crack detection and monitoring. It also designs, manufactures, and sells avionics and aircraft audio systems, as well as electronics manufacturing and prototype services. Structural Monitoring Systems Plc is based in Claremont, Australia.
